
```{r}
# =======================
# PACKAGES
# =======================
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pracma)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(purrr)
library(broom)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# INPUT / OUTPUT
# =======================
file <- "input_files/growth_tecan_BXPC3.csv"
out_dir <- "output/growth_assays/curves_BXPC3vs2"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# =======================
# READ DATA
# Required columns:
#   Experiment
#   Replicate
#   Draxin
#   Hr  (or Hour)
#   Count
# =======================
df_raw <- read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Allow either Hr or Hour in input
if ("Hr" %in% names(df_raw) && !("Hour" %in% names(df_raw))) {
  df_raw <- df_raw %>% rename(Hour = Hr)
}

required_cols <- c("Experiment", "Replicate", "Draxin", "Hour", "Count")
missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df_raw))

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    paste("Missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  )
}

df <- df_raw %>%
  mutate(
    Experiment = factor(Experiment),
    Replicate  = factor(Replicate),
    Draxin     = str_trim(as.character(Draxin)),
    Hour       = as.numeric(Hour),
    Count      = as.numeric(Count)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Experiment),
    !is.na(Replicate),
    !is.na(Draxin),
    !is.na(Hour),
    !is.na(Count)
  )

# Optional manual order
draxin_order <- c("0", "0.55", "1.09", "2.19", "4.38", "8.75", "17.5", "35", "70", "140")
draxin_order_present <- draxin_order[draxin_order %in% unique(df$Draxin)]

if (length(draxin_order_present) == 0) {
  draxin_order_present <- sort(unique(df$Draxin))
}

df <- df %>%
  mutate(Draxin = factor(Draxin, levels = draxin_order_present))

if (!("0" %in% levels(df$Draxin))) {
  stop("Control level '0' was not found in Draxin column.")
}
```

```{r}
# =======================
# BASIC QC
# =======================
dup_check <- df %>%
  count(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin, Hour) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

write.csv(
  dup_check,
  file.path(out_dir, "duplicate_timepoints_check.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

baseline_check <- df %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin) %>%
  arrange(Hour, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  summarise(
    n_timepoints = n(),
    baseline_hr = first(Hour),
    baseline_count = first(Count),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  baseline_check,
  file.path(out_dir, "baseline_check.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

bad_baseline <- baseline_check %>%
  filter(is.na(baseline_count) | baseline_count <= 0)

write.csv(
  bad_baseline,
  file.path(out_dir, "bad_baseline_curves.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# NORMALIZE TO BASELINE
# within each Experiment × Replicate × Draxin
# =======================
df_norm <- df %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin) %>%
  arrange(Hour, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    baseline_hr = first(Hour),
    baseline_count = first(Count),
    Count_norm = Count / baseline_count
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Count_norm),
    is.finite(Count_norm),
    !is.na(baseline_count),
    baseline_count > 0
  )

write.csv(
  df_norm,
  file.path(out_dir, "normalized_timecourse.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# =======================
# SUMMARY FOR PLOTTING
# =======================
df_plot <- df_norm %>%
  group_by(Draxin, Hour) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_norm = mean(Count_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_norm = sd(Count_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_norm = sd_norm / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  df_plot,
  file.path(out_dir, "normalized_timecourse_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# PLOT: normalized growth curves
# =======================
p_norm <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = Hour, y = mean_norm, color = Draxin, group = Draxin)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_norm - sem_norm, ymax = mean_norm + sem_norm),
    width = 2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Normalized growth curves",
    x = "Time (h)",
    y = "Cell count normalized to baseline",
    color = "Draxin (nM)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "normalized_growth_curves_mean_sem.png"),
  plot = p_norm,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "normalized_growth_curves_mean_sem.pdf"),
  plot = p_norm,
  width = 8,
  height = 5
)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# CALCULATE AUC
# one AUC per replicate curve
# =======================
df_auc <- df_norm %>%
  arrange(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin, Hour) %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    baseline_hr = first(baseline_hr),
    n_timepoints = n(),
    AUC_norm = if (n() >= 2) trapz(Hour, Count_norm) else NA_real_,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(AUC_norm))

write.csv(
  df_auc,
  file.path(out_dir, "auc_normalized_by_replicate.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# CALCULATE TREND (SLOPE)
# =======================
df_slope <- df_norm %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin) %>%
  arrange(Hour, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  summarise(
    n_timepoints = n(),
    slope = if (n() >= 2) coef(lm(Count_norm ~ Hour))[2] else NA_real_,
    intercept = if (n() >= 2) coef(lm(Count_norm ~ Hour))[1] else NA_real_,
    r_squared = if (n() >= 2) summary(lm(Count_norm ~ Hour))$r.squared else NA_real_,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(slope))

write.csv(
  df_slope,
  file.path(out_dir, "trend_slope_by_replicate.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# =======================
# MIXED MODEL: AUC
# =======================
if (nrow(df_auc) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(df_auc$Draxin) >= 2) {
  m_auc <- lmer(AUC_norm ~ Draxin + (1 | Experiment), data = df_auc)

  anova_auc <- anova(m_auc)
  emm_auc <- emmeans(m_auc, ~ Draxin)
  posthoc_auc <- contrast(
    emm_auc,
    method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
    ref = which(levels(df_auc$Draxin) == "0"),
    adjust = "dunnett"
  )

  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(anova_auc),
    file.path(out_dir, "auc_mixed_model_anova.csv"),
    row.names = TRUE
  )

  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(emm_auc),
    file.path(out_dir, "auc_emmeans.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(posthoc_auc),
    file.path(out_dir, "auc_draxin_vs_ctrl_dunnett.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
} else {
  message("Skipping AUC mixed model: not enough data.")
}
```

```{r}
# =======================
# MIXED MODEL: TREND / SLOPE
# =======================
if (nrow(df_slope) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(df_slope$Draxin) >= 2) {
  m_slope <- lmer(slope ~ Draxin + (1 | Experiment), data = df_slope)

  anova_slope <- anova(m_slope)
  emm_slope <- emmeans(m_slope, ~ Draxin)
  posthoc_slope <- contrast(
    emm_slope,
    method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
    ref = which(levels(df_slope$Draxin) == "0"),
    adjust = "dunnett"
  )

  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(anova_slope),
    file.path(out_dir, "slope_mixed_model_anova.csv"),
    row.names = TRUE
  )

  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(emm_slope),
    file.path(out_dir, "slope_emmeans.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(posthoc_slope),
    file.path(out_dir, "slope_draxin_vs_ctrl_dunnett.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
} else {
  message("Skipping slope mixed model: not enough data.")
}
```

```{r}
# =======================
# FULL TIMECOURSE MODEL
# =======================
if (nrow(df_norm) >= 4 && dplyr::n_distinct(df_norm$Draxin) >= 2) {
  m_time <- lmer(
    Count_norm ~ Hour * Draxin + (1 | Experiment) + (1 | Experiment:Replicate),
    data = df_norm
  )

  anova_time <- anova(m_time)

  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(anova_time),
    file.path(out_dir, "timecourse_mixed_model_anova.csv"),
    row.names = TRUE
  )

  emtr <- emtrends(m_time, ~ Draxin, var = "Hour")
  posthoc_trend <- contrast(
    emtr,
    method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
    ref = which(levels(df_norm$Draxin) == "0"),
    adjust = "dunnett"
  )

  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(emtr),
    file.path(out_dir, "timecourse_emtrends.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(posthoc_trend),
    file.path(out_dir, "timecourse_trend_vs_ctrl_dunnett.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  # Optional: marginal means by hour
  emm_time <- emmeans(m_time, ~ Draxin | Hour)
  emm_time_vs_ctrl <- contrast(
    emm_time,
    method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
    ref = which(levels(df_norm$Draxin) == "0"),
    adjust = "BH"
  )

  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(emm_time),
    file.path(out_dir, "timecourse_emmeans_by_hour.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )

  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(emm_time_vs_ctrl),
    file.path(out_dir, "timecourse_emmeans_by_hour_vs_ctrl_BH.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
} else {
  message("Skipping full timecourse mixed model: not enough data.")
}
```

```{r}
# =======================
# TIMEPOINT-SPECIFIC STATS
# Draxin vs ctrl at each hour
# =======================

if (nrow(df_norm) >= 4 && dplyr::n_distinct(df_norm$Draxin) >= 2) {
  
  m_time_simple <- lmer(
    Count_norm ~ Draxin * Hour + (1 | Experiment) + (1 | Experiment:Replicate),
    data = df_norm
  )
  
  emm_time_by_hour <- emmeans(m_time_simple, ~ Draxin | Hour)
  
  contrast_time_vs_ctrl <- contrast(
    emm_time_by_hour,
    method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
    ref = which(levels(df_norm$Draxin) == "0"),
    adjust = "BH"   # better here than Dunnett (many timepoints)
  )
  
  results_time <- as.data.frame(contrast_time_vs_ctrl)
  
  write.csv(
    results_time,
    file.path(out_dir, "timepoint_specific_vs_ctrl_BH.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
} else {
  message("Skipping timepoint-specific stats: not enough data.")
}
```

```{r}
# =======================
# FIRST SIGNIFICANT TIMEPOINT PER DOSE
# from timepoint-specific Draxin vs ctrl contrasts
# =======================

if (exists("results_time") && nrow(results_time) > 0) {
  
  first_sig_time <- results_time %>%
    mutate(
      contrast = as.character(contrast),
      Hour = as.numeric(Hour),
      p.value = as.numeric(p.value)
    ) %>%
    # extract the treated dose from contrasts like "1.09 - 0"
    mutate(
      Draxin_test = str_trim(str_remove(contrast, "\\s*-\\s*0$"))
    ) %>%
    group_by(Draxin_test) %>%
    arrange(Hour, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    summarise(
      first_sig_hour = if (any(p.value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)) {
        min(Hour[p.value < 0.05], na.rm = TRUE)
      } else {
        NA_real_
      },
      first_sig_p = if (any(p.value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)) {
        p.value[match(first_sig_hour, Hour)]
      } else {
        NA_real_
      },
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Draxin_test)))

  write.csv(
    first_sig_time,
    file.path(out_dir, "first_significant_timepoint_per_dose.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
} else {
  message("No timepoint-specific contrast results found for first-significant-time extraction.")
}
```



```{r}
# =======================
# ENDPOINT DATASET
# last available timepoint per curve
# =======================
df_endpoint <- df_norm %>%
  group_by(Experiment, Replicate, Draxin) %>%
  filter(Hour == max(Hour)) %>%
  ungroup()

write.csv(
  df_endpoint,
  file.path(out_dir, "endpoint_last_timepoint_per_curve.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# =======================
# 24 h RAW VALUES
# normalized to Draxin 0 mean within each experiment
# =======================
df_24 <- df %>%
  filter(Hour == 24)

ctrl_24_check <- df_24 %>%
  filter(Draxin == "0") %>%
  group_by(Experiment) %>%
  summarise(
    n_ctrl = n(),
    ctrl_mean_24 = mean(Count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  ctrl_24_check,
  file.path(out_dir, "ctrl_24h_check.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

missing_ctrl_experiments <- setdiff(unique(df_24$Experiment), unique(ctrl_24_check$Experiment))
if (length(missing_ctrl_experiments) > 0) {
  warning(
    paste(
      "Some experiments have no 24 h control and will produce NA normalization:",
      paste(missing_ctrl_experiments, collapse = ", ")
    )
  )
}

df_24_norm_ctrl <- df_24 %>%
  group_by(Experiment) %>%
  mutate(
    ctrl_mean_24 = mean(Count[Draxin == "0"], na.rm = TRUE),
    Count_24_norm_to_ctrl = Count / ctrl_mean_24
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(ctrl_mean_24),
    is.finite(ctrl_mean_24),
    ctrl_mean_24 > 0,
    is.finite(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl)
  )

write.csv(
  df_24_norm_ctrl,
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_normalized_to_ctrl_by_experiment.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

df_24_plot <- df_24_norm_ctrl %>%
  group_by(Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_norm = mean(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_norm = sd(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_norm = sd_norm / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  df_24_plot,
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_normalized_to_ctrl_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

p_24 <- ggplot(df_24_norm_ctrl, aes(x = Draxin, y = Count_24_norm_to_ctrl)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_24_plot,
    aes(x = Draxin, y = mean_norm),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = df_24_plot,
    aes(x = Draxin, ymin = mean_norm - sem_norm, ymax = mean_norm + sem_norm),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "24 h raw cell count normalized to experiment-matched Draxin 0",
    x = "Draxin (nM)",
    y = "Cell count at 24 h / control at 24 h"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_normalized_to_ctrl.png"),
  p_24,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_normalized_to_ctrl.pdf"),
  p_24,
  width = 8,
  height = 5
)

cat("Done.\n")
```

```{r}
# =======================
# MIXED MODEL: 24 h DATA
# =======================

if (nrow(df_24_norm_ctrl) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(df_24_norm_ctrl$Draxin) >= 2) {
  
  m_24 <- lmer(
    Count_24_norm_to_ctrl ~ Draxin + (1 | Experiment),
    data = df_24_norm_ctrl
  )
  
  anova_24 <- anova(m_24)
  
  emm_24 <- emmeans(m_24, ~ Draxin)
  
  posthoc_24 <- contrast(
    emm_24,
    method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
    ref = which(levels(df_24_norm_ctrl$Draxin) == "0"),
    adjust = "dunnett"
  )
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(anova_24),
    file.path(out_dir, "24h_mixed_model_anova.csv"),
    row.names = TRUE
  )
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(emm_24),
    file.path(out_dir, "24h_emmeans.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(posthoc_24),
    file.path(out_dir, "24h_vs_ctrl_dunnett.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
} else {
  message("Skipping 24 h mixed model: not enough data.")
}
```

```{r}

# =======================
# 24 h RAW VALUES
# plot normalized to Draxin 0 mean within each experiment
# stats performed on non-normalized raw counts
# =======================

df_24 <- df %>%
  filter(Hour == 24)

# Check control availability per experiment
ctrl_24_check <- df_24 %>%
  filter(Draxin == "0") %>%
  group_by(Experiment) %>%
  summarise(
    n_ctrl = n(),
    ctrl_mean_24 = mean(Count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  ctrl_24_check,
  file.path(out_dir, "ctrl_24h_check.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

missing_ctrl_experiments <- setdiff(
  unique(df_24$Experiment),
  unique(ctrl_24_check$Experiment)
)

if (length(missing_ctrl_experiments) > 0) {
  warning(
    paste(
      "Some experiments have no 24 h control and will produce NA normalization for plotting:",
      paste(missing_ctrl_experiments, collapse = ", ")
    )
  )
}

# =======================
# NORMALIZED DATA FOR PLOTTING ONLY
# =======================

df_24_plot_data <- df_24 %>%
  group_by(Experiment) %>%
  mutate(
    ctrl_mean_24 = mean(Count[Draxin == "0"], na.rm = TRUE),
    Count_24_norm_to_ctrl = Count / ctrl_mean_24
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(ctrl_mean_24),
    is.finite(ctrl_mean_24),
    ctrl_mean_24 > 0,
    is.finite(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl)
  )

write.csv(
  df_24_plot_data,
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_normalized_to_ctrl_by_experiment_FOR_PLOTTING.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

df_24_plot_summary <- df_24_plot_data %>%
  group_by(Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_norm = mean(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_norm = sd(Count_24_norm_to_ctrl, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_norm = sd_norm / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  df_24_plot_summary,
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_normalized_to_ctrl_summary_FOR_PLOTTING.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

p_24 <- ggplot(df_24_plot_data, aes(x = Draxin, y = Count_24_norm_to_ctrl)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_24_plot_summary,
    aes(x = Draxin, y = mean_norm),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = df_24_plot_summary,
    aes(
      x = Draxin,
      ymin = mean_norm - sem_norm,
      ymax = mean_norm + sem_norm
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "24 h cell count normalized to experiment-matched Draxin 0",
    x = "Draxin (nM)",
    y = "Cell count at 24 h / control at 24 h"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_normalized_to_ctrl_FOR_PLOTTING.png"),
  p_24,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "raw_24h_normalized_to_ctrl_FOR_PLOTTING.pdf"),
  p_24,
  width = 8,
  height = 5
)

# =======================
# MIXED MODEL: 24 h RAW DATA
# statistics performed on non-normalized Count values
# =======================

df_24_stats <- df_24 %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Count),
    is.finite(Count),
    !is.na(Draxin),
    !is.na(Experiment)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Draxin = factor(Draxin),
    Experiment = factor(Experiment)
  )

# Make sure 0 nM is the reference level
df_24_stats$Draxin <- relevel(df_24_stats$Draxin, ref = "0")

# Check levels
print(levels(df_24_stats$Draxin))

if (nrow(df_24_stats) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(df_24_stats$Draxin) >= 2) {
  
  m_24_raw <- lmer(
    Count ~ Draxin + (1 | Experiment),
    data = df_24_stats
  )
  
  anova_24_raw <- anova(m_24_raw)
  
  emm_24_raw <- emmeans(m_24_raw, ~ Draxin)
  
  control_ref <- which(levels(df_24_stats$Draxin) == "0")
  
  posthoc_24_raw <- contrast(
    emm_24_raw,
    method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
    ref = control_ref,
    adjust = "dunnett"
  )
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(anova_24_raw),
    file.path(out_dir, "24h_RAW_mixed_model_anova.csv"),
    row.names = TRUE
  )
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(emm_24_raw),
    file.path(out_dir, "24h_RAW_emmeans.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(posthoc_24_raw),
    file.path(out_dir, "24h_RAW_vs_ctrl_dunnett.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  sink(file.path(out_dir, "24h_RAW_mixed_model_summary.txt"))
  print(summary(m_24_raw))
  print(anova_24_raw)
  print(emm_24_raw)
  print(posthoc_24_raw)
  sink()
  
} else {
  message("Skipping 24 h raw mixed model: not enough data.")
}
```
